ISEN 681 Syllabus

Section 600 (15399)

Seminar

Spring 2026 - College Station

Course Information

Meeting Times:  Meeting Type: SEM

Meeting Days: F

Start Time: 1:50PM

End Time: 2:55PM

Start Date: 01/12/2026

End Date: 05/05/2026

Meeting Location:  ETB 1034

Credit Hours:  1

Instructor Details

Joseph Geunes

Email:  geunes@tamu.edu

Office Location:  4024 ETB

Phone:  9798629114

Office Hours

N/A

Preferred Contact Method

Email

Catalog Description

Seminar. (1-0). Credit 1. Opportunity to present research in a professional

atmosphere; presentations are not restricted to thesis or problem research;

acquaints the student with departmental research activities and procedures in

documenting research.

Additional Course Details

This course requires attendance only.  At most two unexcused absences are

permitted.  More than two unexcused absences will result in an unsatisfactory

grade.

Course Learning Outcomes

Upon completion of this course, the learner will be able to:

Understand Industrial and Systems Engineering research trends.

Special Course Designation

None

Textbook and/or Resource Materials

This material Is: Required

No materials are required.

Grading Policy

This course is S/U and grading is attendance based.  Any more than two unexcused

absences will result in an unsatisfactory (U) grade.

Late Work Policy

Work submitted by a student as makeup work for an excused absence is not

considered late work and is exempt from the late work policy ( Student Rule 7 ).

Course Schedule

A seminar is held weekly, with the speaker listed under Assignments.
